tests.name: RolesGuard returns true when no roles required
RolesGuard throws when user not present
RolesGuard throws when user level insufficient
RolesGuard returns true when user has sufficient role
UserHelper hashes and verifies a password
UserHelper accepts password that is exactly minimum length
UserHelper generates min and max verification codes when Math.random is mocked
JwtHelper validateRefreshToken returns sub when token valid
JwtHelper verifyTempToken throws for wrong type
